name: SAS Event Stream Processing
description: Real-time streaming analytics engine that ingests, filters, and analyzes high-velocity data from IoT sensors, transactions, and operational systems — enabling sub-second pattern detection, alerting, and automated responses at the edge or in the cloud.
elevatorPitch: Real-time streaming analytics for IoT, fraud detection, and operational intelligence — processing millions of events per second.
capabilities: Real-time pattern detection and complex event processing
Geofencing and spatial analytics on streaming data
Anomaly detection on high-velocity event streams
IoT device integration via MQTT, OPC-UA, and Kafka
Edge deployment for low-latency local processing
targetBuyer: CTO, CDO, VP of Engineering, Head of IoT/OT, Head of Fraud Operations
integrationPoints: Cloud IoT hubs (AWS IoT, Azure IoT Hub)
